entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY THIS EVENING, THEN MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST AFTER MIDNIGHT
GUSTS UP TO 35 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

CLOUDY WITH SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN PARTLY SUNNY WITH A SLIGHT CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
NORTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 30S
NORTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH

PATCHY FROST IN THE MORNING
SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S
NORTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING EAST IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S
SOUTHEAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS AROUND 60
CHANCE OF RAIN 30 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE UPPER 50S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT
